fields.title: Strict agent frontmatter: reject unknown keys, fix sandbox, support inherit, update SKILL.md
fields.description:
Three fixes from review:

## 1. Reject unknown keys in agent frontmatter parser
In `src/agent/parser.ts`, the Effect Schema `Schema.Struct` silently drops unknown keys. Change it to reject unknown keys so that typos or old field names (like `sandbox_preset`) fail fast with a clear error instead of being silently ignored.

## 2. Migrate all agent .md files to use `sandbox:` field
These bundled agents still use legacy `sandbox_fs`/`sandbox_net`:
- `agents/finder.md`: `sandbox_fs: read-only`, `sandbox_net: allow-all` → `sandbox: read-only`
- `agents/librarian.md`: `sandbox_fs: read-only`, `sandbox_net: allow-all` → `sandbox: read-only`
- `agents/oracle.md`: `sandbox_fs: read-only`, `sandbox_net: allow-all` → `sandbox: read-only`
- `agents/painter.md`: `sandbox_fs: workspace-write`, `sandbox_net: allow-all` → `sandbox: workspace-write`

Remove `sandbox_fs`, `sandbox_net`, and `approval_policy` fields. Use only `sandbox:` with preset name.

Also remove the legacy field support from the parser (`sandbox_fs`, `sandbox_net`, `approval_policy`, `approval_timeout`). No backward compat.

## 3. Support `inherit` in model shorthand
In `src/agent/agent-registry.ts`, `parseModelShorthand` uses `validatePromptModeModelId` which requires `provider/model-id` format. It should also accept `"inherit"` as a valid value (meaning: use parent session model).

## 4. Remove `complexity` from agent-creation SKILL.md
In `skills/agent-creation/SKILL.md`, remove the `complexity` settings example (~line 210) since complexity was removed from the agent system.

## Quality gate
`npm run gate` from extensions/tau/
fields.close_reason: Implemented strict agent frontmatter validation, sandbox preset migration, inherit shorthand support, and SKILL updates; npm run gate passed
